__comment: Central Observability dashboard (central design §9.3, C4). Import into Grafana with a Microsoft SQL Server datasource pointed at the central store DB using a central_grafana-role login. Every panel reads canned central.* views only — never base tables. See coding-docs/observability-docs/central/setup-instructions.md §5.
title: MSSQL Central Observability

list.name: scenario
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT scenario_id FROM central.official_metric_samples ORDER BY scenario_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT perf_run_entities AS [perf runs], diag_session_entities AS [diag sessions], diag_event_rows AS [event rows], started_batches AS [started], failed_or_refused_7d AS [failed/refused 7d] FROM central.central_health

SELECT run_created_at_utc AS time, median_value AS value, scenario_id AS metric FROM (SELECT DISTINCT s.scenario_id, r.created_at_utc AS run_created_at_utc, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.value) OVER (PARTITION BY s.scenario_id, s.run_id) AS median_value FROM central.official_metric_samples s JOIN central.visible_batches v ON v.kind = N'perfRun' AND v.natural_key = s.run_id JOIN central.runs r ON r.upload_batch_id = v.upload_batch_id AND r.run_id = s.run_id WHERE s.name = N'scenario.wallclock' AND ('$scenario' = 'All' OR s.scenario_id = '$scenario')) t WHERE run_created_at_utc >= $__timeFrom() AND run_created_at_utc <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY time
SELECT scenario_id, metric_name, verdict, ROUND(delta_pct, 1) AS delta_pct, latest_run_id FROM central.regressions_last_30d WHERE verdict IN (N'regressed', N'improved') ORDER BY verdict, scenario_id

SELECT CAST(started_at_utc AS date) AS time, COUNT(*) AS value, status AS metric FROM central.upload_history WHERE started_at_utc >= $__timeFrom() GROUP BY CAST(started_at_utc AS date), status ORDER BY time

panels.title: Fleet by build — CI runs vs dogfood sessions

targets.rawSql: SELECT LEFT(sha, 12) AS sha, repo, perf_runs, perf_runs_passed, dogfood_sessions, dogfood_events, dogfood_gaps FROM central.fleet_by_build ORDER BY perf_runs DESC

SELECT TOP (25) session_id, feature, events, error_events, ROUND(error_rate * 100, 2) AS error_pct, window_quality FROM central.sessions_by_feature_error_rate WHERE error_events > 0 ORDER BY error_rate DESC
SELECT upload_policy_id, source_kind, field, dropped_count, batches FROM central.policy_drop_summary ORDER BY dropped_count DESC
